name: Sweet-Sour Barbecued Ribs
recipeIngredient: 6 lb Back Ribs, cut into small serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except ribs in a bowl.
2. Cook the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Prepare a charcoal grill and cook the ribs over medium-hot coals for one hour, turning them occasionally.
4. Brush the ribs with sauce.
5. Turn the ribs and continue cooking until they are done.
